dc:title: Cyclist on a shaded rural road near Isola Farnese
dc:description: Color negative showing a person standing on a pale gravel or dirt road bordered by dense green trees and undergrowth. The road forms a shaded, tunnel-like passage through the vegetation, with bright sunlight filtering through the canopy. A loaded touring bicycle with panniers and gear is parked to the person's right against the roadside bank. On the far right, a fence bears an Italian sign reading "Proprietà Università Agraria di Isola Farnese," indicating property of the agrarian university of Isola Farnese. The scene suggests a bicycle touring stop or rest along a rural wooded route.
